movie.actors: Shaquille O'Neal, Annabeth Gish, Judd Nelson, Richard Roundtree
movie.plot: John Henry Irons designs weapons for the military. When his project to create weapons that harmlessly neutralize soldiers is sabotaged, he leaves in disgust. When he sees gangs are using ...
movie.title: Steel
movie.writer: Louise Simonson (comic book series), Jon Bogdanove (comic book series), Kenneth Johnson
